_meta.company_name: Niva Bupa Health Insurance Company Ltd
_meta.classification_note: Classifications might have changed from Sep 2022 onwards. The new XBRL format added more details to the shareholding pattern from that point on.
_meta.expanded_investor_rows_note: Screener exposes individual entity names when a shareholding line-item (Promoters / FIIs / DIIs / Public) is clicked, but those expanded rows require an authenticated Screener session and interactive expansion. They were not exposed during this capture, so only group-level rows are recorded. No investor-level data was invented; the named-holder breakdown comes from the authoritative exchange filing (shareholding-pattern-snapshot) for the latest period only.
_meta.captured_note: Group-level shareholding-pattern values transcribed from the Screener public company page (company id 1285147), section Investors -> Shareholding Pattern. Used as the offline source-of-record for the ownership-trend ingestion when a live Screener scrape is unavailable (no Playwright / blocked network).
